name: Possessive Makeout
outcome: [AttackerName]'s myriad of clinging hands pull [TargetName] closer and force [TargetHimOrHer] to lean forward, letting [AttackerHimOrHer] drape [AttackerHimOrHer] own arms over [TargetHisOrHer] shoulders with a purr of arousal as [AttackerHeOrShe] presses [AttackerHisOrHer] soft lips to [TargetHisOrHer] and invades [TargetHisOrHer] mouth with [AttackerHisOrHer] sinfully long tongue, stirring up [TargetHisOrHer] powerless mouth while [AttackerHisOrHer] unearthly long-nailed hands affectionately give [TargetHimOrHer] light grazing touches all over.
miss: [AttackerName]'s myriad of clinging hands try to pull [TargetName] closer and force [TargetHimOrHer] to lean forward into a deep kiss, but [TargetHisOrHer] squirming and struggling keeps [AttackerHimOrHer] from pulling [TargetHimOrHer] in!
